event.description:
This is the meetup of our partner Oaklandish meetup DriveAI:

https://www.meetup.com/DriveAI/events/239468061/

-- please register there. They are building a decentralized car data network. Check it out if you're in the East Bay. DriveAI folks say:

* We're building a decentralized network of self-driving car data.

* Learn how you can get involved with your current skill-set and what you could learn.

* Find and team up with others - it's fun and you'll progress faster. Have a car/project you've been working on? Bring it by! Doors open at 5:45 pm.
event.title: [cross-post: partner meetup] DriveAI: open data for self-driving cars!
